Designed for the new SAT

BuildSAT Mathmuscle,
one question at a time.

Curated practice sets, realistic question styles, and instant explanations—so you can move from guessing to knowing exactly why each answer is right.

Start focused practiceTake a timed quiz

No login, no clutter. Just math.

Topics
Linear · Quadratic · Stats · More
Modes
Practice · Review · Timed quiz
Built for
High schoolers shooting 1500 → 1600+

Today's plan

20-question mixed practice

Warm up with easier linear questions, then ramp into mixed algebra, geometry, and functions—just like the real test.

Accuracy goal80%+
Suggested pace~1 min / question

Topic

Linear Equations

One-variable equations, slopes, intercepts and graphing lines.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Systems of Equations

Solving systems with substitution, elimination and graphing.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Quadratics

Factoring, roots, vertex form and graphs of parabolas.

Topic

Exponents & Radicals

Laws of exponents, roots and exponential equations.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Functions

Function notation, domain & range, interpreting graphs.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Geometry

Angles, triangles, circles and coordinate geometry.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Statistics

Mean, median, standard deviation and data displays.

Focus practiceView set →

Topic

Word Problems

Translating real stories into equations and models.
